title: Bindings
excerpt: description: Connect Pages Functions to Cloudflare resources like KV, R2, D1, and Durable Objects. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further.
